title: Ghalibaf adviser on X: 'Trump's ceasefire extension means nothing, losing side cannot dictate terms'
snippet: An adviser to Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf posted on X (formerly Twitter): 'Trump's ceasefire extension means nothing, the losing side cannot dictate terms.' This statement goes further than official diplomatic language, suggesting hardliners view the extension as a sign of US weakness rather than goodwill.
tag_reason: 갈리바프 측근의 구체적 SNS 발언('패배한 측이 조건을 지시할 수 없다')은 이전에 보도되지 않은 신규 반응. 이란 강경파의 연장에 대한 해석을 보여줌.
